A stub or no-op implementation wouldn't add these AST structures, so they would fail on the unmodified code.

Also, since tests are purely AST-based, the agent could reverse-engineer exact expected changes by reading the test file at tests/test_outputs.py and making minimal structural changes to pass AST checks without understanding the bug.
